full_text:
Sima You (Dayou) 司馬攸 (大猷)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima You (司馬攸), styledDayou (大猷). Second son of Sima Zhao. Known as a kind and warm-natured man. Sima You was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima You lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
